allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o BatchMode=yes h2@192.168.1.6 "echo connected && whoami && uname -a")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no h2@192.168.1.6 "echo connected && whoami && uname -a")
Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o PasswordAuthentication=yes h2@192.168.1.6 "echo OK")
Bash(plink -ssh h2@192.168.1.6 -pw raspberry -batch "echo connected && whoami && uname -a")
Bash(plink -ssh h2@192.168.1.6 -pw 1234 -batch "sudo -n echo ok 2>&1 || echo ''needs password''")
Bash(plink -ssh h2@192.168.1.6 -pw 1234 -batch "sudo apt-get install -y dos2unix -qq 2>/dev/null; find ~/Alex_dispenser_project/deploy -name ''*.sh'' -exec dos2unix {} \\; 2>&1 && echo ''fixed''")
Bash(plink -ssh h2@192.168.1.6 -pw 1234 -batch "cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm install 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(plink -ssh h2@192.168.1.6 -pw 1234 -batch "cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build 2>&1")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "cd /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project && sudo rsync -a --exclude=''node_modules'' --exclude=''.git'' --exclude=''data'' --exclude=''packages/frontend/dist'' /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/ /opt/dispenser/ && sudo npm run build -w packages/shared --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build -w packages/backend --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build -w packages/rpi-service --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build:frontend 2>&1 | tail -5")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "sudo cp /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/frontend/src/components/ServicePanel.tsx /opt/dispenser/packages/frontend/src/components/ServicePanel.tsx && cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build:frontend 2>&1 | tail -3")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "tar -xzf - -C /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/ && sudo cp -r /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend/src/ws/ws-handler.ts /opt/dispenser/packages/backend/src/ws/ws-handler.ts && sudo cp -r /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/backend/dist/ /opt/dispenser/packages/backend/dist/ && sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active dispenser-backend")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-backend -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 40 --since ''1 min ago''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-backend -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 60 --since ''5 min ago''")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "cd /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project && sudo rsync -a --exclude=''node_modules'' --exclude=''.git'' --exclude=''data'' --exclude=''packages/frontend/dist'' /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/ /opt/dispenser/ && sudo npm run build -w packages/shared --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build -w packages/backend --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build -w packages/rpi-service --prefix /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build:frontend --prefix /opt/dispenser 2>&1 | tail -5 && sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active dispenser-backend dispenser-rpi")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "ps aux | grep python3 | grep -v grep")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "id h2 && cat /etc/systemd/system/dispenser-rpi.service | grep -i group")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "echo ''1327667363'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt && sleep 1 && ls /tmp/nfc_uid.txt 2>/dev/null && journalctl -u dispenser-backend -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 5 --since ''5 sec ago''")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "rm -f /tmp/nfc_uid.txt && echo ''9999999999'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt && sleep 0.3 && ls /tmp/nfc_uid.txt 2>/dev/null && journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 3 --since ''2 sec ago''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "rm -f /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; echo ''9999999999'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; sleep 1; journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 5 --since ''5 sec ago''")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "sudo systemctl restart dispenser-rpi; sleep 3; rm -f /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; printf ''4126080786'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; sleep 1; journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 10 --since ''5 sec ago''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-backend --no-pager --since ''22:30:00'' | grep -v SERIAL_LOG | grep -v PONG | tail -20")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "printf ''4126080786'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; sleep 0.5; journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager -n 5 --since ''2 sec ago'' | grep -v ''DEBUG\\|serial\\|Serial\\|ping''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "printf ''5555555555'' > /tmp/nfc_uid.txt; sleep 1; journalctl -u dispenser-rpi -u dispenser-backend --no-pager -n 15 --since ''5 sec ago''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "ls /tmp/nfc_uid.txt 2>/dev/null || echo GONE; journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager --since ''22:32:34'' --until ''22:32:36''")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "tar -xzf - -C /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/ && sudo rsync -a --exclude=''''node_modules'''' --exclude=''''data'''' --exclude=''''packages/frontend/dist'''' /home/h2/Alex_dispenser_project/packages/ /opt/dispenser/packages/ && sudo npm run build:frontend --prefix /opt/dispenser 2>&1 | tail -3 && sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active dispenser-backend")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build:frontend 2>&1 | head -20")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "cd /opt/dispenser && sudo npm run build:frontend 2>&1 | tail -5 && sudo systemctl restart dispenser-backend && sleep 2 && systemctl is-active dispenser-backend")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-rpi -u dispenser-backend --no-pager -n 50 --since ''1 min ago'' | grep -Ev ''DEBUG|SERIAL_LOG|Serial received|Processing serial|Serial ping|PONG''")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-rpi -u dispenser-backend --no-pager -n 80 2>/dev/null | grep -v DEBUG | grep -v SERIAL_LOG | grep -v ''Serial received'' | grep -v ''Processing serial'' | grep -v ''Serial ping'' | grep -v PONG | tail -30")

Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager --since ''1 min ago'' 2>/dev/null | grep -v DEBUG | grep -v ''Serial received'' | grep -v ''Serial ping'' | grep -v ''Processing serial data''")
Bash(plink -batch -pw 1234 h2@192.168.1.6 "journalctl -u dispenser-rpi --no-pager --since ''5 min ago'' 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''BUTTON|FILL|EMERGENCY|error|Error|state|State|transition''")
Bash(plink -pw h2 -batch h2@192.168.1.6 "mkdir -p ~/.ssh && cat >> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod 700 ~/.ssh && chmod 600 ~/.ssh/authorized_keys")
